title: Global Financial System on High Alert: Mythos Threat Looms Large
excerpt: As the world grapples with the escalating Mythos threat, Japan's Finance Minister is set to meet with banks to discuss the implications, while MUFG Bank seeks more acquisitions following a $4.3 billion India deal. Meanwhile, the global financial system is on high alert, with the US targeting 5 GW more nuclear power through low-cost finance and investors urging the UK audit watchdog to scrutinize HSBC's climate accounting.

title: Mythos Threat Looms: Global Financial System on the Brink
